start.title: Is your business ready for AI?
start.description: Answer 10 questions grounded in your actual workflows. Get a personalized ROI estimate with annual savings, 3-year projection, payback period, and a prioritized list of where to start.

email.title: Where should we send your report?
email.description: We'll email you a copy of your personalized AI ROI report.
email.validationError: Please enter a valid email address.
email.privacy: We respect your privacy. No spam, ever.

results.title: Your AI readiness report
results.emailSentTo: A copy has been sent to {email}.
results.emailPending: We saved your request for {email}. If the email doesn't arrive, check your spam folder.
results.implementationCostDescription: One-time build + rollout range, scaling with your team size. Real quotes vary with scope.
results.paybackDescription: Time for annual savings to cover the low end of the implementation range.
results.readinessExplainer: Reflects how prepared your org is today to adopt AI successfully.
results.ctaDescription: We turn reports like this into working software. Let's scope what your first AI workflow looks like.

methodology.title: How we calculate your ROI
methodology.intro: Your estimate isn't a random number. It's built from your inputs, the options you pick in the quiz, and a small set of labor-cost assumptions that we document here so you can challenge them.

hourlyRate.title: Base hourly rate
hourlyRate.body: We divide your average annual salary by your typical weekly hours times 50 weeks (not 52, to account for vacation and holidays — a conservative standard).

loadedCost.title: Fully-loaded rate (1.3×)
loadedCost.body: An employee's real cost to the company is not just their salary. Employers also pay payroll taxes, statutory benefits (13th-month pay, profit-sharing in Mexico, etc.), healthcare, and operating overhead (office, software, equipment, training). In Mexico this usually adds 25–40% on top of base salary. We use 1.3× as a balanced, conservative midpoint.

hoursSaved.title: Weekly hours saved
hoursSaved.body: For each question in the quiz, Gemini estimates timeSaving (hours per affected employee per week) and impactRatio (the fraction of your workforce the opportunity touches). We multiply: time_saved = timeSaving × (employees × impactRatio), and sum across all 10 questions.

annualSavings.title: Annual savings
annualSavings.body: Weekly hours × 50 gives annual hours reclaimed company-wide. Multiply by the fully-loaded hourly rate and you get the annual labor savings headline.

implementation.title: Implementation cost range
implementation.body: A rough build + rollout estimate scaled to team size (at least $15,000 for the smallest engagement, linearly increasing with headcount). Real quotes vary a lot with scope — this is a directional range, not a bid.
implementation.example: max($15,000, employees × $300) → up to 3× for complex rollouts

payback.title: Payback period
payback.body: How many months of annual savings it takes to cover the low end of the implementation estimate. Under a year is the norm for well-scoped automations.

caveats.title: Why real-world results often land at 50–70% of this figure
caveats.intro: We'd rather tell you the truth about the estimate than oversell it.

items.0: Hours saved only become money saved if that time gets reinvested into productive work. If it just becomes more coffee breaks, the cost base doesn't actually shrink.
items.1: Adoption takes time. Year 1 typically captures 40–60% of the potential as teams learn new tools; years 2–3 reach 80–90% in steady state.
items.2: AI isn't 100% accurate. There's almost always a human review step that eats back a small share of the time saved.
items.3: External bottlenecks cap the ceiling. If a process depends on people outside your company — a vendor's portal, a customer's response time — AI can't fix what it can't touch.

roi.description1: Your team is spending countless hours on tasks that AI could handle in seconds.
roi.description2: Take our 2-minute quiz to discover your potential savings.
roi.revealPotential: Complete the quiz to reveal your potential
